title: Card Button Accent
description: ATI destination and archive card button

styles.css: &{text-decoration:none; transition:background-color 200ms ease,color 200ms ease;} &:hover{background-color:var(--wp--preset--color--brand-500); color:var(--wp--preset--color--contrast);} &:focus-visible{outline:2px solid var(--wp--preset--color--accent-500); outline-offset:2px;} & svg{transition:transform 200ms ease;} &:hover svg{transform:translateX(1rem);}
